mnemonics: G.R.I.D.: Generate, Refine, Identify, Deploy - the four-step process for a grid-based search.
keyPoints: It is a systematic, brute-force method for hyperparameter tuning.
It evaluates all possible combinations of hyperparameters from a predefined set.
The best model is chosen based on its performance on a validation set.
commonMistakes: Using too fine of a grid, which is computationally expensive.
Forgetting that it only searches over the predefined values and can miss optimal points.
